mapper.sql: select sp.id, sp.product_id, sp.sku_id, sp.source_platform, sp.source_api, sp.barcode, sp.product_name, sp.common_name, sp.brand_name, sp.manufacturer, sp.approval_number, sp.category_id, sp.category_name, sp.specification, sp.unit, sp.packing_ratio, sp.product_status, sp.stock_quantity, sp.warehouse_stock, sp.main_images, sp.min_order_qty, sp.max_order_qty, sp.production_date, sp.expiration_date, sp.shelf_life, sp.is_prescription_drug, sp.medicare_type, sp.traceability_code_status, sp.sales_volume, sp.shop_name, sp.price_retail, sp.price_current, sp.price_step_rules, sp.price_assemble, sp.is_tax_included, sp.freight_amount, sp.free_shipping_threshold, sp.tags, sp.marketing_tags, sp.activity_details, sp.purchase_limits, sp.fusion_group_id, sp.fusion_key, sp.raw_data_payload, sp.collected_at, sp.synced_at from yy_standard_product sp
mapper.select: where sp.fusion_group_id = #{fusionGroupId} order by sp.price_current asc
mapper.insert:
insert into yy_standard_product
product_id, sku_id, source_platform, source_api, raw_data_payload, barcode, product_name, common_name, brand_name, manufacturer, approval_number, category_id, category_name, specification, unit, packing_ratio, product_status, stock_quantity, warehouse_stock, main_images, min_order_qty, max_order_qty, production_date, expiration_date, shelf_life, is_prescription_drug, medicare_type, traceability_code_status, sales_volume, shop_name, price_retail, price_current, price_step_rules, price_assemble, is_tax_included, freight_amount, free_shipping_threshold, tags, marketing_tags, activity_details, purchase_limits, fusion_group_id, fusion_key, collected_at,
#{productId}, #{skuId}, #{sourcePlatform}, #{sourceApi}, #{rawDataPayload}, #{barcode}, #{productName}, #{commonName}, #{brandName}, #{manufacturer}, #{approvalNumber}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{packingRatio}, #{productStatus}, #{stockQuantity}, #{warehouseStock}, #{mainImages}, #{minOrderQty}, #{maxOrderQty}, #{productionDate}, #{expirationDate}, #{shelfLife}, #{isPrescriptionDrug}, #{medicareType}, #{traceabilityCodeStatus}, #{salesVolume}, #{shopName}, #{priceRetail}, #{priceCurrent}, #{priceStepRules}, #{priceAssemble}, #{isTaxIncluded}, #{freightAmount}, #{freeShippingThreshold}, #{tags}, #{marketingTags}, #{activityDetails}, #{purchaseLimits}, #{fusionGroupId}, #{fusionKey}, #{collectedAt},

insert into yy_standard_product (product_id, sku_id, source_platform, source_api, raw_data_payload, barcode, product_name, common_name, brand_name, manufacturer, approval_number, category_id, category_name, specification, unit, packing_ratio, product_status, stock_quantity, warehouse_stock, main_images, min_order_qty, max_order_qty, production_date, expiration_date, shelf_life, is_prescription_drug, medicare_type, traceability_code_status, sales_volume, shop_name, price_retail, price_current, price_step_rules, price_assemble, is_tax_included, freight_amount, free_shipping_threshold, tags, marketing_tags, activity_details, purchase_limits, fusion_group_id, fusion_key, collected_at) values (#{productId}, #{skuId}, #{sourcePlatform}, #{sourceApi}, #{rawDataPayload}, #{barcode}, #{productName}, #{commonName}, #{brandName}, #{manufacturer}, #{approvalNumber}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{packingRatio}, #{productStatus}, #{stockQuantity}, #{warehouseStock}, #{mainImages}, #{minOrderQty}, #{maxOrderQty}, #{productionDate}, #{expirationDate}, #{shelfLife}, #{isPrescriptionDrug}, #{medicareType}, #{traceabilityCodeStatus}, #{salesVolume}, #{shopName}, #{priceRetail}, #{priceCurrent}, #{priceStepRules}, #{priceAssemble}, #{isTaxIncluded}, #{freightAmount}, #{freeShippingThreshold}, #{tags}, #{marketingTags}, #{activityDetails}, #{purchaseLimits}, #{fusionGroupId}, #{fusionKey}, #{collectedAt}) on duplicate key update product_id = values(product_id), source_api = values(source_api), raw_data_payload = values(raw_data_payload), barcode = values(barcode), product_name = values(product_name), common_name = values(common_name), brand_name = values(brand_name), manufacturer = values(manufacturer), approval_number = values(approval_number), category_id = values(category_id), category_name = values(category_name), specification = values(specification), unit = values(unit), packing_ratio = values(packing_ratio), product_status = values(product_status), stock_quantity = values(stock_quantity), warehouse_stock = values(warehouse_stock), main_images = values(main_images), min_order_qty = values(min_order_qty), max_order_qty = values(max_order_qty), production_date = values(production_date), expiration_date = values(expiration_date), shelf_life = values(shelf_life), is_prescription_drug = values(is_prescription_drug), medicare_type = values(medicare_type), traceability_code_status = values(traceability_code_status), sales_volume = values(sales_volume), shop_name = values(shop_name), price_retail = values(price_retail), price_current = values(price_current), price_step_rules = values(price_step_rules), price_assemble = values(price_assemble), is_tax_included = values(is_tax_included), freight_amount = values(freight_amount), free_shipping_threshold = values(free_shipping_threshold), tags = values(tags), marketing_tags = values(marketing_tags), activity_details = values(activity_details), purchase_limits = values(purchase_limits), fusion_group_id = values(fusion_group_id), fusion_key = values(fusion_key), collected_at = values(collected_at), synced_at = now()
mapper.delete:
delete from yy_standard_product where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select * from yy_standard_product where common_name like concat('%', #{commonName}, '%') order by source_platform, collected_at desc

select source_platform as platformCode, count(*) as productCount, count(distinct sku_id) as skuCount, count(distinct fusion_key) as fusionGroupCount, avg(price_current) as avgPrice, min(price_current) as minPrice, max(price_current) as maxPrice from yy_standard_product group by source_platform order by productCount desc
